title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sun Pharmaceutical - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sun Pharmaceutical - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sun Pharmaceutical has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sun Pharmaceutical:
Sun Pharmaceutical is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sun Pharmaceutical!
